what_changes: Keep the same repo-native FireRedAsr2 AED import/load/infer path.
Keep the same model-local venv backend.
Keep the prior CPU fallback torch/torchaudio pins and the installable kaldi_native_fbank pin.
Add setuptools==80.9.0 to requirements.phase1.txt and reinstall so pkg_resources is available to kaldiio during import.
Retain all other runtime packages unchanged.
replan.why_targeted: This change directly mitigates the diagnosed missing support package in the import chain without switching runtime family, broadening scope, or mutating upstream source.
